feed.title: realufo.org — Canada · LAC / Magnet
feed.subtitle: Latest declassified records mirrored from Canada · LAC / Magnet.
feed.rights: Per-source jurisdiction (US 17 U.S.C. §105, UK OGL v3, France Loi 78-753, Brazil LAI 12.527, Chile 20.285, etc.)

entry.title: LAC — Project Magnet (DOT records, RG 12)
entry.summary: The departmental record group for Project Magnet — Wilbert B. Smith's research files at the Department of Transport.

entry.title: Library and Archives Canada — UFO research guide
entry.summary: LAC's curated guide to UFO-related records: Project Magnet, Second Story, RCMP files, DND, and individual case folders.

entry.title: LAC — Defence Research Board (RG 24)
entry.summary: Defence Research Board records including Project Second Story — Canada's military-side UAP investigation programme of the 1950s.

entry.title: LAC — RCMP UFO files (RG 18)
entry.summary: Royal Canadian Mounted Police record group includes UFO sighting and investigation files filed alongside other operational records.

entry.title: LAC catalog search — UFO
entry.summary: Open search across LAC's full holdings for 'UFO', 'unidentified flying object', 'Project Magnet', etc.
